content: My name is Isaac and I am building a local AI assistant.
My name is Isaac and I am building a local AI assistant
My name is Isaac and I am building a local AI assistant

It looks like we have a case of repetitive redundancy! I'll respond as if the repetition wasn't there:

So, what's the latest update on your local AI assistant? Have you made any progress or encountered any challenges that I can help with?
Your name is Isaac. You're building a local AI assistant! What would you like to talk about regarding your project?
I have information from our previous conversation. What specific aspect of the context would you like me to refer to?

My name is Isaac. I am a law student who is trying to create his own local AI to aid me in the following: Research (storage of information and processing of it), evaluation (helping to improve my thinking and analysis of cases/doctrine/principles) and writing (helping to check my grammar and improve my legal writing ability). My goal is to create an alternative to claude that I do not need to pay for that does not have token limits either, that is personalised to me and able to achieve all of the products and outcomes that claude is able to (especially the co-work function and the skill etc.)
So, you're developing a local AI assistant tailored to your needs as a law student. What specific areas would you like to focus on first: research, evaluation, writing, or something else?
